llm_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 800 600" width="100%" height="100%">
  <defs>
    <!-- Background Gradient -->
    <radialGradient id="bgGrad" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="75%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#120b29" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#050714" />
    </radialGradient>

    <!-- Neon Gradients -->
    <linearGradient id="cyanPurple" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#00f3ff" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#b026ff" />
    </linearGradient>
    
    <linearGradient id="purpleCyan" x1="0%" y1="100%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#b026ff" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#00f3ff" />
    </linearGradient>

    <linearGradient id="textGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ffffff" />
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#00f3ff" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ffffff" />
    </linearGradient>

    <!-- Glow Filters -->
    <filter id="glow" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="6" result="blur" />
      <feMerge>
        <feMergeNode in="blur" />
        <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic" />
      </feMerge>
    </filter>

    <filter id="strongGlow" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="12" result="blur" />
      <feMerge>
        <feMergeNode in="blur" />
        <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic" />
      </feMerge>
    </filter>

    <!-- Grid Pattern -->
    <pattern id="grid" width="40" height="40" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <path d="M 40 0 L 0 0 0 40" fill="none" stroke="#00f3ff" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.07" />
    </pattern>

    <!-- Scanline Pattern -->
    <pattern id="scanline" width="4" height="4" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <rect width="4" height="2" fill="#000000" opacity="0.3" />
    </pattern>
  </defs>

  <!-- Background -->
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="url(#bgGrad)" />
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="url(#grid)" />
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="url(#scanline)" pointer-events="none" />

  <!-- Circuit Board Patterns (Background Layer) -->
  <g opacity="0.4">
    <!-- Left Circuits -->
    <path d="M 0 150 L 100 150 L 150 200 L 150 300" fill="none" stroke="#00f3ff" stroke-width="1.5" />
    <circle cx="150" cy="300" r="3" fill="#00f3ff" filter="url(#glow)" />
    <path d="M 50 0 L 50 100 L 100 150" fill="none" stroke="#b026ff" stroke-width="1" />
    <path d="M 200 600 L 200 450 L 250 400 L 350 400" fill="none" stroke="#00f3ff" stroke-width="1.5" />
    <circle cx="350" cy="400" r="3" fill="#00f3ff" filter="url(#glow)" />
    
    <!-- Right Circuits -->
    <path d="M 800 200 L 700 200 L 650 250 L 650 350" fill="none" stroke="#b026ff" stroke-width="1.5" />
    <circle cx="650" cy="350" r="3" fill="#b026ff" filter="url(#glow)" />
    <path d="M 750 600 L 750 500 L 700 450 L 600 450" fill="none" stroke="#00f3ff" stroke-width="1" />
    <path d="M 800 400 L 750 400 L 700 450" fill="none" stroke="#b026ff" stroke-width="1.5" />
    <circle cx="700" cy="450" r="3" fill="#b026ff" filter="url(#glow)" />
  </g>

  <!-- Central AI Core (Artificial Intelligence) -->
  <g transform="translate(350, 300)">
    <!-- Outer Rotating Dashed Ring -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="140" fill="none" stroke="url(#cyanPurple)" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="10 20 5 15" opacity="0.6" filter="url(#glow)">
      <animateTransform attributeName="transform" type="rotate" from="0" to="360" dur="30s" repeatCount="indefinite" />
    </circle>
    
    <!-- Inner Solid Ring -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="120" fill="none" stroke="#00f3ff" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4" />
    
    <!-- Tech Hexagon -->
    <polygon points="0,-100 86.6,-50 86.6,50 0,100 -86.6,50 -86.6,-50" fill="none" stroke="#b026ff" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.5" filter="url(#glow)">
      <animateTransform attributeName="transform" type="rotate" from="360" to="0" dur="20s" repeatCount="indefinite" />
    </polygon>

    <!-- Crosshairs -->
    <path d="M -160 0 L -130 0 M 130 0 L 160 0 M 0 -160 L 0 -130 M 0 130 L 0 160" stroke="#00f3ff" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.7" />
    <path d="M -113 -113 L -95 -95 M 95 95 L 113 113 M -113 113 L -95 95 M 95 -95 L 113 -113" stroke="#b026ff" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.5" />

    <!-- Glowing Core Center -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="45" fill="url(#cyanPurple)" filter="url(#strongGlow)" opacity="0.8">
      <animate attributeName="r" values="40; 48; 40" dur="3s" repeatCount="indefinite" />
    </circle>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="25" fill="#ffffff" filter="url(#glow)" />
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="10" fill="#00f3ff" />
  </g>

  <!-- LLM Data Streams (Large Language Models) -->
  <g transform="translate(650, 300)">
    <!-- Flowing Curves -->
    <path d="M -150 -150 C 0 -150, 50 -50, 50 50 C 50 150, 0 250, -150 250" fill="none" stroke="#b026ff" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.3" />
    <path d="M -150 -100 C 0 -100, 50 0, 50 100 C 50 200, 0 300, -150 300" fill="none" stroke="#00f3ff" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.4" />
    <path d="M -150 -50 C 0 -50, 50 50, 50 150 C 50 250, 0 350, -150 350" fill="none" stroke="#b026ff" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.2" />

    <!-- Data Packets (Moving Nodes) -->
    <circle r="4" fill="#00f3ff" filter="url(#glow)">
      <animateMotion path="M -150 -150 C 0 -150, 50 -50, 50 50 C 50 150, 0 250, -150 250" dur="6s" repeatCount="indefinite" />
    </circle>
    <circle r="3" fill="#b026ff" filter="url(#glow)">
      <animateMotion path="M -150 -100 C 0 -100, 50 0, 50 100 C 50 200, 0 300, -150 300" dur="8s" repeatCount="indefinite" />
    </circle>
    <circle r="5" fill="#00f3ff" filter="url(#glow)">
      <animateMotion path="M -150 -50 C 0 -50, 50 50, 50 150 C 50 250, 0 350, -150 350" dur="5s" repeatCount="indefinite" />
    </circle>

    <!-- Cascading Text / Code -->
    <g font-family="monospace" font-size="10" fill="#00f3ff" opacity="0.7">
      <text x="-120" y="-120">0x00F3</text>
      <text x="-120" y="-100">101100</text>
      <text x="-120" y="-80">LLM_</text>
      <text x="-120" y="-60">V2.0</text>
      
      <text x="-120" y="-20">ATTN</text>
      <text x="-120" y="0">MECH</text>
      <text x="-120" y="20">>>></text>
      <text x="-120" y="40">OK</text>
      
      <text x="-120" y="80">DECOD</text>
      <text x="-120" y="100">ING...</text>
      <text x="-120" y="120">TOKEN</text>
      <text x="-120" y="140">: 4096</text>
      
      <text x="-120" y="180">LOSS:</text>
      <text x="-120" y="200">0.0042</text>
      <text x="-120" y="220">ACC:</text>
      <text x="-120" y="240">99.9%</text>
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- Typography & Titles -->
  <g>
    <!-- Main Title -->
    <text x="400" y="100" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="42" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle" fill="url(#textGrad)" letter-spacing="4" filter="url(#glow)">
      AI技术概览
    </text>
    <!-- Subtitle -->
    <text x="400" y="135" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="normal" text-anchor="middle" fill="#00f3ff" letter-spacing="8" opacity="0.9">
      AI TECHNOLOGY OVERVIEW
    </text>
    
    <!-- Decorative Line under Title -->
    <path d="M 250 155 L 550 155" stroke="url(#cyanPurple)" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.8" />
    <polygon points="400,150 410,155 400,160 390,155" fill="#00f3ff" filter="url(#glow)" />

    <!-- Label: Artificial Intelligence -->
    <g transform="translate(350, 480)">
      <text x="0" y="0" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="24" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle" fill="#00f3ff" filter="url(#glow)">
        人工智能
      </text>
      <text x="0" y="25" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="normal" text-anchor="middle" fill="#b026ff" letter-spacing="2">
        ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE
      </text>
      <path d="M -80 40 L 80 40" stroke="#00f3ff" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.5" />
    </g>

    <!-- Label: Large Language Models -->
    <g transform="translate(650, 480)">
      <text x="0" y="0" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="24" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle" fill="#b026ff" filter="url(#glow)">
        大语言模型
      </text>
      <text x="0" y="25" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="normal" text-anchor="middle" fill="#00f3ff" letter-spacing="2">
        LARGE LANGUAGE MODELS
      </text>
      <path d="M -80 40 L 80 40" stroke="#b026ff" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.5" />
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- UI Accents & Data Bars -->
  <g>
    <!-- Top Left Corner Bracket -->
    <path d="M 30 60 L 30 30 L 60 30" fill="none" stroke="#00f3ff" stroke-width="3" filter="url(#glow)" />
    <text x="40" y="50" font-family="monospace" font-size="10" fill="#00f3ff" opacity="0.8">SYS.INIT // OK</text>

    <!-- Top Right Corner Bracket -->
    <path d="M 770 60 L 770 30 L 740 30" fill="none" stroke="#b026ff" stroke-width="3" filter="url(#glow)" />
    <text x="760" y="50" font-family="monospace" font-size="10" fill="#b026ff" text-anchor="end" opacity="0.8">NET.LINK // ACTIVE</text>

    <!-- Bottom Left Corner Bracket -->
    <path d="M 30 540 L 30 570 L 60 570" fill="none" stroke="#00f3ff" stroke-width="3" filter="url(#glow)" />
    
    <!-- Bottom Right Corner Bracket -->
    <path d="M 770 540 L 770 570 L 740 570" fill="none" stroke="#b026ff" stroke-width="3" filter="url(#glow)" />

    <!-- Data Visualization Bars (Bottom Left) -->
    <g transform="translate(40, 520)">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="120" height="4" fill="#00f3ff" opacity="0.8" />
      <rect x="0" y="10" width="80" height="4" fill="#b026ff" opacity="0.8" />
      <rect x="0" y="20" width="150" height="4" fill="#00f3ff" opacity="0.8" />
      <rect x="0" y="30" width="60" height="4" fill="#b026ff" opacity="0.8" />
      <rect x="0" y="40" width="100" height="4" fill="#00f3ff" opacity="0.8" />
    </g>

    <!-- Data Visualization Bars (Bottom Right) -->
    <g transform="translate(640, 520)">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="100" height="4" fill="#b026ff" opacity="0.8" />
      <rect x="0" y="10" width="140" height="4" fill="#00f3ff" opacity="0.8" />
      <rect x="0" y="20" width="70" height="4" fill="#b026ff" opacity="0.8" />
      <rect x="0" y="30" width="180" height="4" fill="#00f3ff" opacity="0.8" />
      <rect x="0" y="40" width="90" height="4" fill="#b026ff" opacity="0.8" />
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>
